Analytics & Ad Blocker: Open Source Privacy Firewall
An extension for privacy and security for the internet.

Analytics & Ad Blocker: The Ultimate Open-Source Privacy Firewall

Take total control of your browser. Block ads, disable scripts, and visualize your carbon footprint with a professional-grade, open-source toolkit.

Analytics & Ad Blocker is an open-source browser firewall that blocks ads and tracking scripts, lets you control heavy page resources, and shows what third parties try to load on the sites you visit. It is designed for people who want transparency, local processing, and granular controls instead of black-box blocking.

Key features

Ad and tracker blocking: Blocks many common advertising and tracking requests
Custom network request blocking: Create rules to block specific domains, URLs, or scripts

Toggle content types: Quickly disable JavaScript, images, or videos to speed up pages and reduce load

Live tracker dashboard: View third-party activity and request behavior in real time across tabs

Local-first privacy: Blocking decisions and dashboard insights are processed on your device

Open-source integrity: No paid whitelisting and no acceptable ads program
Live tracker dashboard details. Use the dashboard to understand what a page is doing behind the scenes.

Live tag monitoring: See tracker tags and third-party requests as they attempt to run

Data audit visibility: Identify which sites are most aggressive with third-party connections

Impact metrics: Correlate blocked requests with lighter page behavior for everyday performance gains.

Extension Analysis: Have the ability to vet another extension to see if it is safely using permissions. Download source code for additional analysis.

🛠 Total Granular Control (New Features)
Go beyond basic ad blocking. Our advanced toolkit allows you to toggle specific web elements on the fly to maximize speed and minimize energy consumption:

Block Custom Network Requests: Create your own rules to stop specific domains or scripts from ever connecting.

Toggle Content Types: Instantly disable JavaScript, Images, or Videos with a single click—perfect for "Ultra-Low Power" browsing and extreme speed.

Open-Source Integrity: 100% transparent. No "Acceptable Ads" programs, no paid whitelisting. Check our code on GitHub and contribute to the mission.

Stops common trackers and analytics tags from loading so you share less data by default

Reduce page bloat by blocking unwanted network requests and optionally heavy resources

Help you identify which websites load the most third-party scripts and requests
Improves browsing focus by removing ad interruptions

📊 The Live Tracker Dashboard
See exactly what’s happening behind the scenes. Our Custom Dashboard provides a real-time visualization of your privacy:

Live Tag Monitoring: Watch exactly how tracker tags (Google, Adobe, Yahoo) try to fire across all your open tabs.

Impact Metrics: See the direct correlation between blocked scripts and your reduced carbon footprint.

Data Audit: Identify which websites are the "hungriest" for your data and your device's energy.

View Other Extension Permissions: Have the ability to use AI analysis to identify if an extension is using their requested permissions appropriately.

🚀 Why We Outperform the Rest
By combining the light footprint of uBlock Origin with the deep insights of Ghostery, we offer a unique "Sustainability Suite":

Ad-Free Experience: No banners, no video interruptions, no nonsense.

A greener internet: By blocking JavaScript and heavy media, you drastically reduce CPU/RAM usage, extending your laptop’s battery life and lowering CO2 emissions.

Privacy-First Architecture: We never collect your data. All request blocking and dashboard analytics are processed locally on your device.

🌍 A Greener Internet Starts with You
The internet consumes more electricity than many countries. A massive portion of that is wasted on tracking scripts you never asked for. Analytics & Ad Blocker lets you opt-out of the waste and join the Globemallow.io mission for a sustainable digital future.

Key Features at a Glance:
Advanced Blocking: YouTube Ads, Google Analytics, Social Pixels, and custom CSS/JS.

Performance: Drastically reduces page weight for 2x faster loading.

Transparency: Open-source license.

No Tracking: No accounts, no logs, no cloud-processing.

Stop being a passenger in your own browser. Switch to the open-source ad blocker that gives you the dashboard, the control, and the conscience to browse better.

Frequently asked questions

Does it collect my data?
No. The extension is built to work locally and does not require an account.

Can I block a specific website or script that annoys me?
     Yes. You can add custom blocking rules for domains or specific requests.

Will disabling JavaScript or media break sites?
     Some sites rely on scripts and media. The one-click toggles make it easy to turn         resources off for speed, then turn them back on if a site needs them.

Is it really open source?
Yes. The project is open source so you can review the code, verify behavior, and contribute.

Who is it for?
   Privacy-focused users who want fewer trackers and ads
   Power users who want per-site controls and custom rules
   Anyone who wants faster browsing and fewer unwanted third-party connections
   Take control of what loads in your browser with an open-source ad and analytics    blocker that prioritizes transparency, local processing, and real user control.

uBlock Resurrected (BETA)

uBlock Resurrected is an experimental content blocker built from the ground up to bring advanced filtering capabilities to the Manifest V3 (MV3) engine. This is a BETA version intended for testing and development feedback.

Current Status & Beta Limitations:
Engine: Successfully ported core filtering logic to the MV3 declarativeNetRequest and scripting APIs.

UI Work-in-Progress: Users may encounter display issues in the Logger iframe and legacy links to original documentation pages.

YouTube Compatibility: Due to frequent changes in platform architecture, ad-blocking on YouTube may be intermittent as we refine our rulesets.

Known Conflicts: May conflict with other privacy extensions like Privacy Badger or Ghostery. For the best experience, we recommend testing with other blockers disabled.

Platform: Currently optimized for Chrome only.

Logging: Per-page block counters on the extension icon are currently disabled to optimize performance.

Roadmap for Stable Release:
Enhanced Tools: Consolidation of the element zapper and picker into a unified interface.

Advanced Logic: Implementation of keyword-based DOM filtering and procedural cosmetic rules.

Security: Improved firewall rules and network request interception.

Optimization: Full code refactoring to modern ECMAScript standards and UI/UX overhaul.

Imasse - Search to Fund Brighter Futures
Search the web and raise money for your school or others for free!

Imasse is a free search engine that donates a portion of its profits to schools around the world from our search ads. You can easily register with your school (if your school has partnered with us) and raise funds directly for their school. If you do not choose to register with your school you will still help to raise money for students across the world all for free!

By using Imasse you are also giving back to those in need. Our company is committed to giving back when we can through ad revenue presented on our search engine without costing anything to the user. When downloaded, your search engine and new tab will be changed to Imasse (powered by Yahoo), where every search you make helps raise money for schools around the world.

★ Features ★
Find top visited website our new tab page
Custom wallpaper and theme for new tab page
Raise money for your own school (if partnered)

★ Your Privacy ★
At Imasse we believe our users' privacy is a big deal. That is why we only collect the needed information from your searches on the Imasse search engine, nothing more. 

★ Permissions ★
The Imasse extension requires several permissions, here are a list off all the permissions we require and why we need them:

"Read and change data on all imasse.com sites": This allows us to hide all of the download buttons on Imasse.com when you have Imasse installed.
"Replace the page that you see when opening a new tab": We will update your new tab page so that you can easily search with Imasse every time you open a new tab.
"Read your browsing history": We don't actually read your browsing history; this is so our extension can provide a list of your top visited sites on the Imasse new tab page. This information does not leave your computer.
"Change your search settings to Imasse.com": We will use this permission to update your default search to Imasse.

★ Legal ★
By installing the Imasse search extension you agree to install this extension, and you agree to the End User License Agreement and the Privacy Policy which can be found below. 

https://imasse.com/privacy-policy
https://imasse.com/terms-of-service

★ How To Uninstall ★
1) On your computer, open Chrome.
2) At the top right, click More and then More tools and then Extensions.
3) On to the extension you want to remove, click Remove.
4) Confirm by clicking Remove.

Happy searching :)
A Chrome extension to improve productivity and reduce distractions.

Transform your productivity with the latest Simple Focus Mode - a beautifully redesigned Pomodoro timer that eliminates distractions through elegant minimalism. Perfect for professionals, students, and remote workers who value focus over visual clutter.

🎯 What's New in v0.4.0 (The NYE '25-26 Update):
  • "Zone In" Context Menu: Right-click anywhere to start a focus session immediately
  • "One More Minute": Extend your session on the fly by 60s without breaking flow
  • True Dark Mode: A stunning new high-contrast solid black theme for OLED screens
  • Theme Auto-Sync: Automatically respects your system's Light/Dark preference
  • Polite Notifications: Redesigned alerts that respect your focus state
  • 100% Local Privacy: Streamlined code ensuring all data stays on your device

✨ Key Features:
  • Complete Pomodoro Cycles: Automatic transitions between focus sessions (25m) and breaks (5m/15m)
  • Smart Website Blocking: Dynamic blocking of distracting sites (Social Media, Video, etc.) during focus time only
  • Minimal Design Philosophy: "Liquid Calm" aesthetic using glassmorphism and modern typography
  • Session Management: Track progress through 4 focus sessions with visual cycle indicators
  • Pause & Resume: Full timer control with accurate time calculations
  • Custom Timers: Flexible 1-120 minute sessions for different work styles
  • Real-time Updates: Browser tab shows countdown timer and session status

🎨 Design Philosophy:
  Unlike cluttered productivity apps, Simple Focus Mode embraces the "less is more" principle. Every element serves a purpose, creating a calm, focused environment that enhances concentration rather than competing for attention.

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts:
  • Spacebar: Start/Pause/Resume
  • Escape: Stop timer
  • C: Toggle custom timer
  • D: Toggle dark mode (Manual override)

🎯 Perfect For:
  • Developers needing "Zone In" speed
  • Designers seeking distraction-free UI
  • Students managing deep work sessions
  • Remote workers needing structure

Why Choose Simple Focus Mode?
Professional-grade productivity tool with enterprise-level development practices. Every line of code is linted, tested, and optimized for performance. NO tracking, NO ads, NO bloat. Just focus.

Block distracting websites and stay focused with timed website blocking

Block distracting websites and stay focused with Zen Sites.

This minimalist extension lets you add sites to a blocklist and set a timer to temporarily disable access—helping you stay present, productive, and distraction-free.

Key Features:
- Custom Site Blocking: Add any website you want to avoid—news, social media, shopping, and more
- Focus Timer: Set how long you'd like the site to remain blocked and reset only when you allow it
- One-Click Control: Easily toggle the blocker or update your list of blocked sites
- Lightweight & Fast: Designed for performance with no bloat

How to Use:
- Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store
- Click on the Zen Sites icon in your browser toolbar
- Add the websites you want to block
- Set a timer and start your focused session
- Return to your tasks with peace of mind, knowing distractions are out of reach

MS Technet Secure runs 100% locally inside your browser using Chrome's declarativeNetRequest API. No browsing data, URLs, or personal information is ever collected, stored, or transmitted to any external server. We don't have a user database. We don't sell data. We don't track you.

2. Browse any site — ads, trackers, and malware are blocked instantly.
3. Click the toolbar icon to view your live blocking stats.
4. Use Settings to enable/disable filter categories or manage your whitelist.
5. To support a site, click "Pause on this site" to allow their ads.

Enhance you focus, manage your time effectively, and harness the power of productive browsing.

Maximize Your Productivity, Minimize Distractions

Welcome to Zenlify, the ultimate Chrome extension designed for those seeking to enhance their focus, manage their time effectively, and harness the power of productive browsing. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone in between, Zenlify is your digital companion in achieving unparalleled efficiency.

Key Features:

Pomodoro Timer for Focused Work Sessions: Engage in deep work with our integrated Pomodoro timer. Customize your focus sessions and breaks to fit your workflow and stay on track with your tasks.

Session Logging & Google Calendar Sync: Automatically log your focus sessions and integrate them with Google Calendar. Gain insights into your productive hours and streamline your scheduling.

Comprehensive Browsing Analytics: Discover your digital habits with detailed statistics. Track time spent and frequency of visits on each website, empowering you to make informed decisions about your browsing behavior.

Website Blocking & Management: Say goodbye to digital distractions. Block access to websites that interrupt your focus, and manage your list of blocked sites with ease.

Tab Limitation for Clutter-Free Browsing: Keep your browser tidy and your mind clear by limiting the number of open tabs. Concentrate on what's important without the overwhelm of excessive tabs.

YouTube Distraction Shield: Stay focused on your purpose on YouTube by hiding recommendation videos. Eliminate the lure of the endless browsing loop.

Ad-Blocking & Content Filtering: Enjoy a cleaner, faster, and more focused browsing experience. Block intrusive ads and hide content based on your preferred keywords.

Why Choose Zenlify?

Customizable to Your Needs: Tailor features like the "Pomodoro timer" and content filters to fit your personal workflow and preferences.
Insightful Data for Self-Improvement: Use your browsing analytics to identify areas for productivity enhancement.
User-Friendly Interface: Simple, intuitive, and easy to navigate, allowing you to start improving your productivity right away.
Zenlify is more than just a tool; it's your pathway to mastering your online time and enhancing your focus. Install now and transform your browsing experience into a productivity powerhouse!
